'''Bandit Squadron''' was a squadron of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] that was deployed by the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']].

==Formation of the squadron==
[[File:TIEExperimentalProjectMission02-XWA.png|thumb|left|250px|A TIE BigGun is blasted by a Bandit Squadron Z-95 Headhunter.]]
Bandit Squadron was initially put together for a mission related to the investigation of the [[TIE Experimental Project]]. Pilot [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] was a member of this squadron.

Because of the covert nature of the mission, it was deemed necessary to conceal [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] involvement, thus [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] less closely associated with the Rebels than [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]], [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]], or [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] were chosen. The Z-95 was considered an appropriate craft.

Armed with [[ion pulse]] warheads, the Z-95s of Bandit Squadron disabled a [[Suluk|modified]] [[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport|Escort transport]] in addition to examples of a [[TIE Experimental M3|TIE Warhead]] and a [[TIE Experimental M2|TIE BigGun]].

Because of the success of this mission in both securing the prototypes and concealing the involvement of the Alliance, Bandit Squadron found a further role as the covert operations unit operating from the ''Liberty''.

==Subsequent activities==
The squadron again played a key role after the destruction of the Rebel supply center on [[Gal Milnor]]. With the loss of critical food and munitions, the Alliance urgently required an alternative means of supplying its fleet massing at [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] immediately before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] provided a list of trading contacts in the sector, of which the most influential was the entrepreneur and casino owner [[Dunari]].

[[File:RawDealBanditSquadron-XWA-DAT15210-36.png|thumb|right|250px|Bandit Squadron defends the ''Raw Deal'' from attack by Imperial forces.]]
Ace Azzameen and his fellow pilots reprised their roles as members of Bandit Squadron, escorting the [[Muurian transport]] ''[[Saloon]]'', which carried Alliance delegates to a clandestine meeting with Dunari aboard his [[Personal Luxury Yacht 3000/Legends|Personal Luxury Yacht 3000]], the ''[[Raw Deal]]''.

The meeting was interrupted by the arrival of the pirate [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|Marauder Corvette]] ''[[Vulture (Marauder-class)|Vulture]]'' and its accompanying [[Toscan 8-Q starfighter]] group [[Fury Squadron|Fury]], and Y-wing group [[Pirate Squadron|Pirate]].

Bandit Squadron fought off this threat, only to be interrupted a second time when an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] patrol led by [[SCT Scout craft|SCT Scout Craft]] ''[[Omicron 023]]'' arrived in the system, followed by the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']]. The ''Corrupter'' launched starfighters to attack the docked craft, so the meeting was hastily adjourned, and both Dunari and the Rebel delegates escaped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], with Bandit Squadron covering their retreat.

Later, Alliance analysts concluded that Bandit Squadron's use of Z-95s had allowed them to avoid revealing to the Empire their true identity as Rebel ships.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
